head.title: Kaicheng Yang | Academic Homepage
head.description: Academic website for Kaicheng Yang (Yang Kaicheng), undergraduate researcher at Shanghai Jiao Tong University working on efficient machine learning, diffusion models, and AI for life science.

intro.title: Kaicheng Yang
intro.subtitle: Efficient ML  ·  AI4Human
intro.motto: 淡观山水闲看月  只读诗书不念愁

main.name: Kaicheng Yang
main.role: Undergraduate Researcher · Shanghai Jiao Tong University
main.roleZh: 上海交通大学自动化系 · 本科生研究者
main.signature: I work between efficient machine learning and AI4Human: compressing models to identify the necessary structures intelligence truly depends on, and using AI to understand the human brain while expanding the interaction bandwidth between carbon-based and silicon-based intelligence.
main.signatureZh: 我的研究位于 Efficient ML 与 AI4Human 之间：一方面通过压缩模型识别智能真正依赖的必要结构，并以此迈向下一代 AI 架构；另一方面尝试利用 AI 理解人类大脑，探索下一代人机交互方式，提高碳基智能与硅基智能之间的交互带宽。

affiliations.textZh: 上海交通大学自动化系

affiliations.text: Tsinghua AIR · GenSI Lab · Prof. Hao Zhou / Prof. Weiying Ma
affiliations.textZh: 清华 AIR · GenSI Lab · 周浩老师 / 马维英老师

focus.title: Efficient ML
focus.text: I use model compression as a scientific probe: by stripping away redundancy through quantization, sparsity, and low-rank structure, I try to identify the necessary structures that intelligence truly depends on and use them to move toward next-generation AI architectures.
focus.textZh: 我将模型压缩视为一种研究智能结构的探针：通过量化、稀疏和低秩结构不断剥离冗余，观察哪些结构仍然保留下来，从而识别智能真正依赖的必要结构，并以此迈向下一代 AI 架构。

focus.title: AI4Human
focus.text: I want to use AI to understand the human brain, explore the next generation of human-computer interaction, and increase the communication bandwidth between carbon-based and silicon-based intelligence.
focus.textZh: 我希望利用 AI 理解人类大脑，探索下一代人机交互方式，并提高碳基智能与硅基智能之间的交互带宽。

news: 2026.05 · RobuQ, Info-Gain, and Q-DiT4SR accepted to ICML 2026.
